value.description: A one-use super-dose of mechanites tuned to heal health conditions. The mechanites will target and heal the single worst health condition affecting someone at any given time. Works even on health conditions that would otherwise be incurable. The mechanites can even transmute themselves into organic matter, forming new limbs or organs as needed.\n\nThe healing process is not without cost — the mechanites leave a mark on the user's mind. The treated invariably lose a passion, gain a negative trait, or fall briefly ill.
